shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch inside a text box nearly at the 140-character limit, editing intently.
assets.caption: Hatch inside a text box nearly at the 140-character limit, editing intently.
assets.prompt: Twitter's 140-Character Limit | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with the graduation cap and growth arrow) standing inside an oversized text box that is almost full — with a character counter showing "138/140" at the bottom right of the box. Hatch's expression is focused, editing intently. Cream background, no speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch explaining the connection between SMS 160 characters and Twitter's 140-character limit.
assets.caption: Hatch explaining the connection between SMS 160 characters and Twitter's 140-character limit.
assets.prompt: Twitter's 140-Character Limit | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing at a simple visual of an SMS phone from 2006 with a "160 chars" label, connected by an arrow to a Twitter bird icon with "140 chars" label, showing the SMS origin of the constraint. Clean, explanatory diagram style. Cream background. No speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.prompt: Twitter's 140-Character Limit | lesson-frame: Hatch in calm coaching pose, standing beside a text box that has grown larger (the 280 expansion) while the content inside it is still short — a small tight sentence in the middle of a large empty box.
